title: Case: Dismissed Oner Turkipriot v. Skibidi Fart

posts.author: Howard Hamlin
posts.rawText:
This is on behalf of NorthernCypriot
Thread Title: Trial of Skibidi Fart For criminal charges

Thread Body:

Azelea Criminal Court Plaintiff

v.

Skibidi fart Defendant

Civil Complaint:

NorthernCypriot would like Skibidi Fart to go to Trail after committing multiple armed robberies and 17 counts of murder

Parties:

Plaintiff - NorthernCypriot
Defendant - Skibidifart

Factual Allegations:

SkibidiFart has killed me 5 seperate times, with him twice robbing me of my money, ive also witnessed him kill multiple other people! i have screenshots as evidence of his killings and a video of him killing me

Legal Claims:

I want him arrested for Murder, Theft, Assult with a deadly weapon, and armed robbery,

Prayer for Relief:

i want to sue him for emotional distress and suffering as ive been killed and robbed, losing my money and more importantly my XP stopping my progress on being able to enchant my pickaxe leading to me not being able to make much money in the mines

Verification:

I, Oner Turkipriot, hereby affirm that the allegations in the complaint AND all subsequent statements made in court are true and correct to the best of the plaintiff's knowledge, information, and belief and that any falsehoods may bring the penalty of perjury.

posts.author: Westray
posts.rawText:
Before the Court can proceed with the case, we ask that you provide:
1. Evidence that you are authorized to represent the state - if you are filing criminal charges, it must be on behalf of the government
2. Evidence of the alleged crimes that occurred

posts.author: Howard Hamlin
posts.rawText:
Westray said:
Before the Court can proceed with the case, we ask that you provide:
1. Evidence that you are authorized to represent the state - if you are filing criminal charges, it must be on behalf of the government
2. Evidence of the alleged crimes that occurred

posts.author: Westray
posts.rawText:
Do you have any screenshots supporting that you are a Prosecutor for the Government of Azalea Isles? In order to pursue a criminal case, you must be representing the government. You need to make it clear what case is being filed:

1. Criminal Case - Azalea Isles (government) v. Defendant: over crimes committed
2. Civil Case - Plaintiff (any player) v. Defendant: over some form of relief (e.g. money/productivity lost, breach of contract, etc.)

posts.author: Howard Hamlin
posts.rawText:
Westray said:
Do you have any screenshots supporting that you are a Prosecutor for the Government of Azalea Isles? In order to pursue a criminal case, you must be representing the government. You need to make it clear what case is being filed:

1. Criminal Case - Azalea Isles (government) v. Defendant: over crimes committed
2. Civil Case - Plaintiff (any player) v. Defendant: over some form of relief (e.g. money/productivity lost, breach of contract, etc.)
This is a civil case idk $4000 my client whats as a form of relief from the pain he has felt I’m writing this all while half awake so idk how sense this makes he murdered and robbed and stuff it’s all in the thing

posts.author: Westray
posts.rawText: Your initial filing states "Azelea Criminal Court Plaintiff" - please amend your post to be a civil case for your client.

posts.author: Westray
posts.rawText: Counsel, you have 7 days from this post to clarify your case or it will be dismissed due to inaction.

posts.author: Westray
posts.rawText: Given the lack of response from the Plaintiff's attorney, this case is hereby dismissed without prejudice.
